user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user this memory belongs to.

category.description: The type of memory. identity: who the user is (name, role, location). preference: likes, dislikes, style choices. knowledge: facts, expertise, domain knowledge. goal: objectives, plans, aspirations. context: situational details (current project, tools in use). relationship: connections to people, teams, organizations. episode: summary of a notable past interaction. sentiment: expressed feelings or attitudes about topics.

content.description: A concise natural-language statement capturing the memory. Write in third person about the user. Each entry should be a single atomic fact or observation.

tags.description: Lowercase keywords for filtering and grouping. Use stable, reusable terms (e.g. 'python', 'food', 'work', 'family').

source_conversation_id.description: The identifier of the conversation from which this memory was extracted.
